payload.answer: The SQL query was not executed because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false. No memory cards were accessed, modified, or returned.
payload.decision: SQL execution blocked due to BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false

entity_resolution.reason: No memory cards were queried or modified; SQL execution was disabled.

details: SQL debugging feature is disabled as configured.
Query '/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards' was rejected.
No side effects occurred; memory state remains unchanged.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true to enable SQL debugging queries.
Use the Brain API or UI to inspect memory cards programmatically.
Check system logs for confirmation of SQL disablement status.
